subject: Helping Torres Family Barber Shop Grow Online
body:
Hi Jose,

I came across Torres Family Barber Shop and really like what you're doing in Westborough. As a fellow Massachusetts business owner, I know how important it is to have a strong online presence — and I think there's a great opportunity for Torres Family Barber Shop to reach even more customers.

My name is Isaiah Wright, and I run One Vision Marketing out of Bridgewater, MA. We're a full-service digital marketing agency that helps small businesses like yours grow through:

- Professional website creation & hosting
- Google, Facebook & Instagram advertising
- SEO to help customers find you online
- Strategies to bring in more clients and boost revenue
- Social media management & brand development

We've worked with businesses across Massachusetts, and I also have marketing research experience with RECNA here in Bridgewater, helping them expand their reach and grow.

I'd love to learn more about Torres Family Barber Shop and see how we can help — no pressure, just a conversation. If you're open to it, I can even put together a free website mockup so you can see what's possible.

Would you be open to a quick chat this week?

Best regards,
Isaiah Wright
One Vision Marketing
Bridgewater, MA

subject: Michele — Your Clients Are Googling You Before They Call
body:
Hi Michele,

I came across your profile while researching real estate agents in the Taunton area and wanted to reach out personally.

Most buyers and sellers Google their agent before they ever pick up the phone. Right now, they're finding your brokerage page — not your story, your brand, or why someone should work specifically with you.

My name is Isaiah Wright and I run One Vision Marketing out of Bridgewater, MA. We build personal real estate agent websites designed to:

- Put your name and face front and center (not just your brokerage)
- Show up on Google when someone searches "Realtor in Taunton MA"
- Capture leads directly from your own site 24/7
- Build your brand on Facebook, Instagram & Google Business
- Include your listings, reviews, and contact info all in one place

Agents with a strong personal brand close more deals — period. Your brokerage gets leads today. Your own website makes sure YOU get them for years to come.

I'd love to put together a free website mockup so you can see exactly what it could look like — no commitment, no pressure.

Would you be open to a quick 10-minute call this week?

Best regards,
Isaiah Wright
One Vision Marketing | Bridgewater, MA
onevisionmarketing5@gmail.com
https://pradazay1-code.github.io/marketing-Sauce/
notes: Real estate agent — no personal website. Brokerage: Realty Executives Metro South

My name is Isaiah Wright and I run One Vision Marketing out of Bridgewater, MA. We build personal real estate agent websites designed to:

- Put your name and face front and center (not just your brokerage)
- Show up on Google when someone searches "Realtor in Brockton MA"
- Capture leads directly from your own site 24/7
- Build your brand on Facebook, Instagram & Google Business
- Include your listings, reviews, and contact info all in one place

Agents with a strong personal brand close more deals — period. Your brokerage gets leads today. Your own website makes sure YOU get them for years to come.

I actually already built a sample site for you so you can see exactly what it could look like:
https://pradazay1-code.github.io/marketing-Sauce/clients/leads/websites/jeffrey-touron/

This is just a preview — we'd customize it with your real headshot, listings, brokerage info, and contact details. No commitment, no pressure.

Would you be open to a quick 10-minute call this week?

Best regards,
Isaiah Wright
One Vision Marketing | Bridgewater, MA
onevisionmarketing5@gmail.com
